prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-LBLH-COUPEGLASSES-4PC-BUN Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): LABREA LIFE + HOME Existing Title: Labrea Life and Home 4pc Classic Etched Champagne Coupe Glasses, Cocktail Glassware Set Description: Offering up some serious tactile and optical intrigue, these classic and timeless etched champagne coupe glasses will quickly become the talk of your table.

Now, maybe you’re thinking, just how durable are these? And, practicality wise, will I actually ever use them? First, these things of beauty are dishwasher safe and incredibly durable; made from soda lime glass and weighing in at 0.55lbs per glass, they make look delicate and fragile, when in fact they hold their weight well with a sturdy stem and base. As for their practicality, we can’t help but brag about their versatility; whether it’s sparkling wine or champagne, straight up drinks, sugar rimmed cocktails, a chocolate mousse dessert or pretty yogurt parfait, these coupe glasses can do it all.

Now, if you’re still not convinced, let’s talk about their design. Not to get all technical, but we need to point out that these champagne glasses feature the classic wide rim bowl with tapered lip design that all traditional coupe glasses should have. Why does this matter? Elevating your drinking experience where aromas and flavors are concerned, these coupe glasses enhance both of the former, and if served in another type of glass, like a tall tumbler or champagne flute, would likely be missed. This distinct and intentional rounded shape aerates natural flavors and boosts aromas, allowing the wine or craft cocktail you’re about to sip to be enjoyed at its full potential.

And lastly, on the visual design front, these coupe glasses will elevate any table setting, whether it be a casual brunch or formal dinner. They’ll sit pretty with a variety of other glassware and tabletop decor, adding a touch of vintage flair, while simultaneously grounding your tablescape with their classic design.

So, without further ado… pop the champagne and grab a glass, these sparkling wine coupe glasses are perfect for any celebratory occasion. Search Terms: Glass cups home decor house warming wedding gifts new home chef kitchen gadgets food meal prep tools cocktail prosecco champagne glasses coffee bar accessories drinkware barware mixology bartender kit glassware dessert cups wine glasses vintage retro Features: - CHAMPAGNE GLASSES: Elevate your drinking experience, whether it be for sparkling wine or cocktails, with these timeless coupe glasses; meeting at the corner of modern and vintage, these etched coupe glasses naturally enhance aromas and flavors via their distinctive wide bowl and tapered lip design - GLASS COUPE GLASSES: The etched, vintage inspired bowl lend some serious optic and visual table top intrigue, and while they make look delicate, don’t be fooled, these glasses hold their weight well with a sturdy stem and base - COCKTAIL GLASSES: Versatile glassware can be used to showcase elegant cocktail creations, sparkling wine, champagne or prosecco, or as stunning dessert cups for chocolate mousse, ice cream, gelato, sorbet and much more - DISHWASHER SAFE: These coupe glasses are conveniently top rack dishwasher safe, but for long lasting enjoyment, hand washing is recommended - SPECIFICATIONS: Diameter: 4.25 inches; Height: 6.25 inches; Capacity: 8.5 FL OZ; Material: Soda Lime Glass; Individual Glass Weight: 0.55lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Labrea Life and Home 4-Pc Classic Etched Champagne Coupe Glasses
